arts.ttl: BFW Question of the Day — March 14th: Is it too early for Bayern Munich to give up on Sacha Boey?
arts.sum: Bayern Munich ’s Sacha Boey arrived in Bavaria back in January of 2024 and captured the imagination of some fans who were looking for new blood at the right-back position. Also, be sure to stay tuned to Bavarian Podcast Works for all of your up to date coverage on Bayern Munich and Germany.

arts.ttl: Minjae Kim ruled out for weeks
arts.sum: Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany has revealed that Minjae Kim will have to take a break due to an injury.

arts.ttl: Man City and Arsenal interested? Why Leroy Sané looks set to leave Bayern this summer

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich Joshua Kimmich preferred career path of Thomas Müller over Toni Kroos
arts.sum: Former Bayern players Phillip Lahm, Thomas Müller, Toni Kroos and David Alaba had massive success with the club. “It was a fundamental decision for me: do I go the Thomas Müller and Philipp Lahm way or the David Alaba and Toni Kroos way and try something new.

arts.ttl: 'I had an offer' - Bruno Fernandes opens up on transfer talks and Manchester United trophy ambition
arts.sum: Bruno Fernandes is captain fantastic for Man Utd this season but he could have left Old Trafford in the summer.

arts.ttl: Steffen Baumgart delivers “incognito” attendance plans and sarcasm ahead of Bayern Munich game
arts.sum: FC Union Berlin trainer Steffen Baumgart generated a few laughs at his Thursday press conference.

arts.ttl: England squad announcement LIVE: Thomas Tuchel set to name players for first World Cup qualifiers
arts.sum: The new England manager will hold a press conference after announcing his first Three Lions squad ahead of World Cup qualifiers against Albania and Latvia at Wembley

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Which striker did Julian Nagelsmann try to convince to switch to Germany?; Bayern Munich players recognized for efforts; Manchester City to hold fire sales?; Bayer Leverkusen confident on keeping Florian Wirtz; and MORE!
arts.sum: Bayern Munich stars Kim Min-jae and Harry Kane were named to WhoScored.com’s UEFA Champions League Team of the Week for the 2nd leg of the Round of 16: Bayer Leverkusen are confident that star player Florian Wirtz, 21, will extend his contract, despite interest in a €120m move from Bayern Munich and Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Joshua Kimmich explains Gunners transfer snub after Mikel Arteta vow
arts.sum: Arsenal have discovered their next Champions League opponents after getting past PSV but the Gunners have been handed a significant transfer blow ahead of the summer window

arts.ttl: Germany manager Julian Nagelsmann opines that Aleksandar Pavlović is not getting enough game time at Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Having said all that, it may not quite be right to claim Pavlović was not getting a lot of game time at Bayern. Germany manager Julian Nagelsmann, forced to omit Pavlović from his international squad due to the illness, spoke about Pavlović’s lack of game time and the illness, as captured by @iMiaSanMia .
